title: Supply Chain Manager - Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Supply Chain Manager looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates:
Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates!
